title: Assistant Foreman - Carpentry Shop
blurb: The Assistant Foreman – Carpentry Shop supports the Foreman and management team in coordinating daily maintenance operations within an assigned campus zone or skilled trades shop. This position provides frontline leadership to maintenance…

title: RazorTemp - AVCF Student Account Representative
blurb: Answering phones, office emails, helping with walk-in traffic, other duties as assigned. Regular, reliable, and non-disruptive attendance is an essential job duty, as is the ability to create and maintain collegial, harmonious working…

title: Certified Nursing Assistant or Medical Assistant - 10 or 12 Month
blurb: The Certified Nursing Assistant (CNA) works under the direct supervision of licensed nurses or medical providers to administer direct patient care- either in person or through telehealth- and assist with the flow of patients in the…

title: Computer Lab Technician - Hourly
blurb: Summary Of Job Duties The Computer Lab Technician assists students, using hardware/software. This position will be working closely with students, staff, and faculty. You will be expected to have great customer service. You will be asked…

title: ArcBest Internship Program
blurb: Logistics technology and operations internships at a Fortune 500 freight company with a growing tech arm.

title: Arvest Bank Internships
blurb: Finance, banking operations and technology internships at one of the region's largest banks.

title: Crystal Bridges & the Momentary — Internships
org: Crystal Bridges Museum of American Art
blurb: Paid internships at a world-class art museum: curatorial, education, marketing, culinary, operations. Museum experience of this caliber is rare outside coastal cities.

title: Field Agent Internships
blurb: A retail-insights tech company founded by UofA grads — crowdsourced shopper data for major CPG brands. Marketing, analytics and engineering exposure in one small team.

title: Finding NWA — Regional Internship Hub
blurb: The region's talent hub: internship listings across NWA employers plus intern social programming each summer. A good second stop after the listings here.

title: Garver Launch — Engineering Internships
blurb: Paid 10–12 week engineering internships running spring, summer and fall, with housing stipends when applicable. Named a Large Employer of the Year for mentoring UofA engineering interns.

title: On-Campus Jobs & Federal Work-Study Feed
blurb: The official stream of on-campus openings — tutors, help desk, peer mentors, department assistants. Log in with your UARK email, filter "On-Campus"; work-study eligible students can filter for funded positions.

title: Honors College Research Grants
blurb: Honors students can get their own mentored research funded. Pair a grant with a lab from this site's directory and you're doing paid, publishable work before you graduate.

title: I³R Student Research Opportunities
blurb: The university's flagship new research institute works across AI, robotics, bioscience and materials with an explicit industry-deployment mission. Watch its openings and email research teams directly.

title: IT Services Student Technicians
blurb: Help desk, classroom AV, computer lab support. The classic first tech job: real ticket queues, real users, and a reference that says you can troubleshoot under pressure.

title: J.B. Hunt Internship Program
blurb: Technology, engineering, logistics and operations internships at one of North America's largest transportation companies — HQ is 15 minutes up I-49 from campus.

title: University Libraries Student Assistants
blurb: Circulation desks, digitization projects, special collections. Quiet, study-adjacent shifts — postings appear on Handshake each semester.

title: McMillon Innovation Studio — Design Teams
blurb: Interdisciplinary student teams solve real problems for real organizations each semester — with mentors from NWA's biggest companies. Standout teams advance to funded Product Teams. Every major welcome.

title: Movista — Retail Tech Internships
blurb: A Bentonville software company building retail workforce-execution tools used by major brands. Engineering, product and customer-success exposure at a real SaaS company minutes from the Walmart ecosystem.

title: Ozark Integrated Circuits — Student Internships
blurb: Extreme-environment semiconductors designed at the research park next to campus. Genuine chip-design and test experience at a small company — the kind of resume line that gets interviews.

title: RazorTemps — Campus Temporary Staffing Pool
blurb: The university's in-house temp team places students into paid administrative positions across campus departments. One application, many placements — a low-friction first campus job.

title: Simmons Foods Internships
blurb: Summer internships across operations, food safety, ag services and corporate functions at a major NWA poultry and pet-food producer, actively recruiting UofA students.

title: Startup Junkie Internships
blurb: The entrepreneurship consultancy on the Fayetteville square: interns support founders, run events and see dozens of real startups up close. Walkable from campus.

title: Tyson Foods University Internships
blurb: Food science, supply chain, engineering, IT and finance internships at the world's second-largest protein company, headquartered one town over.

title: UREC Student Employment
blurb: One of the largest student employers on campus: lifeguards, fitness attendants, intramural officials, trip leaders. Kinesiology-adjacent hours plus a genuine leadership ladder to supervisor roles.

title: Walmart Internships — Tech & Corporate
blurb: Software engineering, data science, supply chain, merchandising and finance internships at the home office of the world's largest company — a structured 10-week program with heavy UofA recruiting and strong return-offer rates.

title: Washington Regional — Student Clinical Roles
blurb: Fayetteville's hospital hires patient care techs and support staff — clinical hours that count for nursing and pre-health applications.

title: RazorTemps – Temporary Positions (Anticipated Current and Future Openings)
